synopsis:
Star Wars (2020) Vol. 4: Crimson Reign
Is a trade paperback compilation of Marvel Star Wars (2020) Comic Series.
Luke Skywalker's quest for answers takes a dangerous turn! As the Rebellion tries to pull itself together for a last-ditch effort to defeat the evil Galactic Empire, Luke realizes that it is time to take the next step on the path to become a Jedi. After nearly dying at the hands of Darth Vader, Luke knows he has much to learn to defeat the Dark Lord of the Sith. But the Jedi order [sic] is gone, and his teachers have vanished...where can Luke turn to find the legacy he so desperately needs? The voice of Jedi Master Yoda will be a key piece of instruction in his journey — but the lesson Luke must learn will not be taught by Yoda. And this lesson will take — and give — more than the young Skywalker could ever have imagined!
Collecting:
Star Wars (2020) #19-25
title: Star Wars (2020) Vol. 04: Crimson Reign
